IRS990.ActivityOrMissionDesc: TO PROVIDE COMPREHENSIVE PRIMARY CARE, ADDRESSING THE WHOLE PERSON NEEDS, INCLUDING BEHAVIORAL AND ORAL HEALTH CARE.
IRS990.MissionDesc: TO PROVIDE PATIENT-CENTERED HEALTH CARE WITH EXCELLENCE IN QUALITY, SERVICES, AND ACCESS FOR ALL.
IRS990.Desc: THE HEALTH CENTER PROVIDED 18,000 PRIMARY CARE, BEHAVIORAL HEALTH, AND GENERAL DENTISTRY ENCOUNTERS TO 3,850 PATIENTS DURING THE YEAR.

SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: AVH DETERMINES WHETHER ITS TAX POSITIONS ARE "MORE-LIKELY-THAN-NOT" TO BE SUSTAINED UPON EXAMINATION BY THE APPLICABLE TAXING AUTHORITY BASED ON THE TECHNICAL MERITS OF THE POSITIONS. AS OF JUNE 30, 2024, AVH HAS REVIEWED ITS TAX POSITIONS AND HAS CONCLUDED NO RESERVE FOR UNCERTAIN TAX POSITIONS IS REQUIRED. AVH'S EXEMPT ORGANIZATION INFORMATION RETURNS ARE SUBJECT TO REVIEW THROUGH THREE YEARS AFTER THE DATE OF FILING FOR FEDERAL AND FOUR YEARS AFTER THE DATE OF FILING FOR STATE.
IN SCHEDULE M, PART I, COLUMN (B), THE ORGANIZATION IS REPORTING THE NUMBER OF STOCK CONTRIBUTIONS RECEIVED (DEFINED AS EACH SEPARATE GIFT) AND THE NUMBER OF MEDICAL ITEMS RECEIVED.
ORGANIZATION USED A STOCK DONATOR TO PROCESS AND SELL STOCK DONATION.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION B, LINE 11B
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: THE FORM 990 WILL BE MADE AVAILABLE TO THE BOARD FOR REVIEW PRIOR TO SUBMISSION IN E-FORM IF AVAILABLE OR IF NOT, IT WILL BE REVIEWED AT THE NEXT REGULAR BOARD MEETING.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION B, LINE 12C
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: AN ANNUAL CONFLICT OF INTEREST DISCLOSURE FORM IS REQUIRED BY C-SUITE STAFF AND BOARD MEMBERS. THE CEO IS RESPONSIBLE FOR DISCLOSING POTENTIAL CONFLICTS OF INTEREST TO THE BOARD CHAIR. IF A POSSIBLE CONFLICT OF INTEREST ARISES INVOLVING STAFF, THE CEO AND HR DIRECTOR DETERMINE WHETHER A CONFLICT EXISTS AND UPON ACTIONS TO BE TAKEN. THESE ACTIONS MAY INCLUDE A CHANGE OF ASSIGNMENTS AND MONITORING OF THE CONFLICT. IF THE POSSIBLE CONFLICT INVOLVES BOARD MEMBERS, THE BOARD DETERMINES WHETHER A CONFLICT EXISTS. IF A CONFLICT OF INTEREST IS DETERMINED TO EXIST INVOLVING BOARD MEMBERS, THEY MAY NOT VOTE NOR PARTICIPATE IN DISCUSSIONS REGARDING THE SUBJECT.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION B, LINE 15
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: COMPENSATION IS DETERMINED FOLLOWING A PERFORMANCE REVIEW AND AS COMPARABLE TO PEERS AS OBTAINED THROUGH THE CALIFORNIA PRIMARY CARE ASSOCIATION ANNUAL SALARY SURVEY RESULTS. THE EXECUTIVE BOARD MEMBER COMMITTEE, CONSISTING OF CHAIR, VICE CHAIR, AND SECRETARY, LEADS THE CEO ANNUAL PERFORMANCE REVIEW PROCESS, CONFIRMS CURRENT ANNUAL SALARY, AND REVIEWS BOARD-APPROVED SALARY RANGES FOR THE CEO POSITION. THE BOARD OF DIRECTORS COMPLETES ANNUAL PERFORMANCE EVALUATION FORMS WHICH ARE REVIEWED BY THE EXECUTIVE COMMITTEE TO DETERMINE PERFORMANCE-BASED INCREASES. DELIBERATIONS AND DECISIONS ARE DOCUMENTED AND RECORDED IN A CLOSED BOARD MEETING. ALL EVALUATIONS, NOTES, AND A SUMMARY PRESENTED TO THE CEO ARE MAINTAINED IN THE CEO'S PERSONNEL FILE. THIS PROCESS WAS LAST UNDERTAKEN IN 2023.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION C, LINE 19
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: COPIES OF OUR FINANCIAL AUDITS ARE AVAILABLE UPON REQUEST AT OUR OFFICES. THE CORPORATE BYLAWS AND THE CONFLICT OF INTEREST POLICY CONTAINED WITHIN ARE NOT AVAILABLE FOR PUBLIC INSPECTION.
